prompt: I need to understand the rules around restrictive covenants on a freehold property. Where should I look?
expected_output: Specific authoritative source URLs for restrictive covenant guidance

assertions.text: Response provides specific URLs to authoritative sources (not just 'check the Land Registry')
Response mentions HMLR Practice Guides (PG40 or PG62)
Response references the Law Commission report on restrictive covenants if relevant
Response cites actual GOV.UK or Land Registry URLs
Response distinguishes pre-1926 vs post-1925 covenants if appropriate
